CONTENT.Career: Maswanhise started his career in the academy of EFL Championship side Leicester City.On 6 January 2024, Maswanhise made his senior debut for Leicester as a 77th-minute substitute for Wanya Marçal during a 3–2 away win against Millwall in the third round of the FA Cup.
CONTENT.Personal life: He is the son of Zimbabwean sprinter Jeffrey Maswanhise.
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 6 January 2024As of match played 11 June 2024
CONTENT.International career: On 26 March 2024, Maswanhise made his senior Zimbabwe debut in a 3–1 loss against Kenya.

SUMMARY: Tawanda Jethro Maswanhise (born 20 November 2002) is a Zimbabwean footballer who last played as a midfielder or winger for Leicester City.
